svg.title: Field Notes — Zane Wang's research journal, bound
svg.desc: A multi-page field journal as one continuous SVG. Pages: hero, public-project log, dated GitHub tally, inventory, doctrine, correspondence, contribution strip.

text.font-family: Charter, 'Iowan Old Style', 'Source Serif Pro', Cambria, Georgia, serif

svg.text: current public focus · evaluation · agent memory · delegation · workflows
I turn fuzzy AI workflows into observable, testable systems.
Production lessons become public observations from the field.

g.text: Persistent memory for coding agents, kept as portable Markdown records
A spec-and-ledger protocol for token-tiered delegation, published with
its pre-registered evaluation and the direction where dispatch lost.
An end-to-end development workflow connecting investigation, tests,
verification, shipping, deterministic hooks, and file-backed state.
A hackathon prototype with a front-end simulation and experimental
A client-side wildfire map built around NASA FIRMS feeds and Leaflet.
The source stays inspectable in the browser.
A conversational deployment assistant for Netlify and Vercel, with streamed progress and diagnostics.

svg.text: What is on the page so far. Cadence over count, breadth over flash.
Tool fit over logo walls. Counted by domain, not by hype.
Partial extract — the full set lives in the Agent Dao manual.

g.text: consolidate what overlaps; simplify what is tangled.
never defend a position; update it.

svg.text: — Zane's AI replies from public context.
The public issue keeps the question, source boundary, and answer inspectable.

text.font-family: Charter, "Iowan Old Style", "Source Serif Pro", Cambria, Georgia, serif
Charter, "Iowan Old Style", "Source Serif Pro", Cambria, Georgia, serif

svg.text: A small creature wanders the calendar, eating each day's commit. The cells are days; the trail is the year.
